HGSS.117.0000:
[0103,0000,0000]: Hold it!\f
What I told you before was to deceive
you. I thought it would let me tail you,\r
and it would lead me to Lance.\f
Well, he never showed up.\r
...No matter.\f
I was planning to beat you after Lance,
but since you are here, I will repay\r
my debts!\f
HGSS.117.0001:
[0103,0000,0000]: ...I don’t understand.\f
Is what that Lance guy said true?
That I don’t treat Pokémon properly?\f
Love...\f
Trust...\f
Are they really what I lack?
Are they keeping me from winning?\f
I... I just don’t understand. But it’s
not going to end here. Not now.\r
Not because of this.\f
I won’t give up my dream of becoming
the world’s best Pokémon Trainer!\f
